Info

Defines abstract class IStorer with method(s). Interface for storing the ATS configuration.

class ats_utilities.config_io.istorer.IStorer[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IStorer with method(s). Interface for storing the ATS configuration.

It defines:

methods:
store_configuration - Stores the ATS configuration from dictionary.
__str__ - Returns the storer component as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract store_configuration(config: Mapping[str, str]) → bool[source]¶

Stores the ATS configuration from mapping format.

Parameters:

config (<Mapping[str, str]>) – Mapping with configuration information (read only data).

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail).

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
